reasoning_content: The generated RISCV .inc files are in `/workspace/YatCC/llvm/build/lib/Target/RISCV/`. I need to find where task5 expects them and create a symlink or copy.

action.command: cd /workspace/YatCC && find build -name "RISCVGenRegisterInfo.inc" -o -name "RISCVGenInstrInfo.inc" 2>/dev/null; grep -n "RISCVGenRegisterInfo\|RISCVGenInstrInfo" task/5/EmitMIR.cpp task/5/CMakeLists.txt | head -10

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "cd /workspace/YatCC && find build -name \"RISCVGenRegisterInfo.inc\" -o -name \"RISCVGenInstrInfo.inc\" 2>/dev/null; grep -n \"RISCVGenRegisterInfo\\|RISCVGenInstrInfo\" task/5/EmitMIR.cpp task/5/CMakeLists.txt | head -10", "summary": "Find where RISCV .inc files are expected"}

summary: Find where RISCV .inc files are expected
